page.title: Profile
page.subtitle: Manage your account, preferences, and security.

fields.emailReadonly: Contact an admin to change your email.
fields.displayNamePlaceholder: How your name appears in audit logs and reports
fields.displayNameHelper: Visible to your team on cases, audit events, and reports.
fields.lastActiveFirstSession: Welcome! This is your first session.

mfa.resetBody: For security, MFA reset is performed by an administrator. Click below to send a reset request; an admin will contact you within one business day.
mfa.resetSent: Reset request sent. An admin will contact you.

password.title: Password
password.description: Self-serve password changes are coming soon. For now, contact your administrator.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Review devices currently signed in to your LiverRa account.

ruo.neverAccepted: Not yet accepted — complete onboarding to accept.
ruo.reAcceptBody: If your organisation requires periodic re-acceptance, you can record a fresh signature here. This action requires step-up MFA.
ruo.footerPill: Research Use Only — outputs are not for clinical decision-making.

errors.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be 80 characters or fewer.
